productName: Ooowee - JUICED 1G Infused PreRoll - Ghost Berry - Crunch Berries - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Crunch Berriez flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of berry, apricot, and blueberry, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
